description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential neighborhood block featuring several single-story houses arranged along intersecting streets. Each house is surrounded by green lawns, driveways, and fenced backyards, with some properties including garages and visible vehicles. The houses have flat or low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. Trees are planted along the sidewalks and within some yards, adding greenery to the scene. The streets are wide and bordered by sidewalks, with clear separations between private and public spaces. The overall layout is open and organized, reflecting a modern planned community.
description: A suburban block with several single-story modern houses, fenced yards, driveways, and tree-lined streets.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facades of the houses, driveways, and fenced backyards, with trees and cars visible along the street.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side profiles of the houses and the layout of the intersecting streets are prominent, with more visible cars and open lawns.
description_view_2: This perspective highlights the rear of the houses, fenced yards, and a large green backyard area, with the street layout receding into the background.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the street running through the neighborhood, the front yards, and the arrangement of houses along both sides of the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main doors with small porches or steps, some with overhangs and direct driveway access
